# The Monolith Athletic Club

The Monolith is a cinematic, industrial-style athletic club designed for those who train with intent. No shortcuts, no excuses, no limits.

## Information
- [The Monolith Website](http://localhost:4173/) - Official web app home
- [Ethos](http://localhost:4173/#ethos) - Our core training philosophy
- [Arsenal](http://localhost:4173/#arsenal) - High-performance equipment details
- [Roster](http://localhost:4173/#roster) - Professional coaching profiles
- [Configure](http://localhost:4173/#configure) - Membership configurator
- [Contact](http://localhost:4173/#contact) - Get in touch
